title: Physics for Mortals: We unravel the mysteries of the universe
author: Wordsus Team
description: Discover the secrets of the universe in this complete guide to 365 physics lessons. From Newton's laws to quantum mechanics and the multiverse, explained in a simple way for everyone.

chapters.title: The law of inertia: why things don't stop
chapters.description: We explore Newton's first law of motion. Discover why an object stays in motion until an external force stops it.

chapters.title: Heat and energy: fundamentals of thermodynamics
chapters.description: We analyze the basic principles of heat and temperature. You will learn how thermal energy flows and affects all the materials in our environment.

chapters.title: Electromagnetism: the invisible force that moves the world
chapters.description: Discover how electricity and magnetism come together. We explore this fundamental force that lights up our cities and makes technology work today.

chapters.title: The nature of light: how photons behave
chapters.description: Is light a wave or a particle? We unravel the dual behavior of light and how photons interact with matter in the visible universe.

chapters.title: The mystery of black holes in our galaxy
chapters.description: Enter the fascinating world of black holes. We analyze what they are, how they form in space and what happens if matter crosses their horizon.
